title: How to Run the Embedding Pipeline

# How to Run the Embedding Pipeline

Step 1: Ensure kairix is installed and configured.
Step 2: Run `kairix embed` to process new vault content.
Step 3: Run `kairix benchmark run` to verify recall.
Step 4: Check logs at $KAIRIX_DATA_DIR/logs/embed.log.
